title: Past time markers
subtitle: Anchor the past clearly.
overview: Past time markers help listeners know the action is finished.
Put them at the beginning or end of the sentence.

items.en: Yesterday I studied for one hour.
Last night I had dinner with a friend.

items.es: La semana pasada fui al médico.
items.en: Last week I went to the doctor.

items.es: El mes pasado compré un teléfono.
items.en: Last month I bought a phone.

items.es: Hace dos días escribí un email.
items.en: Two days ago I wrote an email.
